THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MASEL PHOTO, INC.,CAL CORP DBA UNIVERSAL CAMERA SHLOMI, SION SHLOMI, JEWEL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2106 JACKSON STREET #7, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA $11,614.00 RENT, $6,517.50 ATTORNEY FEES, $1,401.97 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $19,533.47, LEASE FORFEITED, BACK RENT AMOUNT INCLUDES DAILY DAMAGES AMOUNT OF $106.00. ATTORNEYS FEES AWARDED PER DECLARATION. COSTS PER COST BILL.
